# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](../../security/advisories/new) ("Report a
vulnerability"). Include a description, reproduction steps, and impact. You will
receive an acknowledgement and a coordinated timeline for a fix and disclosure.

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are provided for the latest published `latest` dist-tag release.
Pre-release (`next`) versions are not covered by the security policy.
